name: Pizza Hut Pizza Crust
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix 1 cup flour and remaining ingredients in a food processor; beat for 1 minute.
2. Add flour gradually and process until dough leaves the side of the container.
3. Place dough in a greased bowl, turn to grease the top, and cover with plastic wrap.
4. Let rise in refrigerator overnight.
5. Divide dough into thirds.
6. Press with heel of hand onto greased pizza pan until crust fills the pan.
7. Bake in 350°F oven for 5 minutes.
8. Freeze.
9. When ready to make pizza, remove from freezer and quickly cover with pizza sauce and toppings.
10. Bake on oven rack without pan.
